maintain.request: Add observer support: a new OnTransition(fn) method that registers callbacks invoked, in registration order, after each successful transition with (from, event, to). Observers must NOT be called for rejected events, and nil callbacks must be ignored. This lets callers log/audit state changes without polling Current().

review.bug: In Fire, the destination state is assigned with m.current = to before the ok check, so a rejected (illegal) event overwrites the current state with the zero value instead of leaving it unchanged.
keywords: rejected event corrupts state to zero value
fire must not change state on error
